project_type: Next.js 16.2.6 app with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
test_framework: Playwright for e2e tests in tests/ directory
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build to verify no TypeScript/build errors. Run pnpm lint to check for linting issues.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Zapier webhook URL configured via env var ZAPIER_WEBHOOK_URL.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns in components/lead-capture/ and app/api/ directories. Use 'use client' directive for client components. API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse from next/server.
key_patterns: API routes follow Next.js App Router pattern (app/api/*/route.ts). Lead capture forms use client-side React with useState/useEffect. Forms use markLeadCaptured() and isLeadAlreadyCaptured() from lead-capture-utils.ts. Existing email-results API route shows the pattern for server-side POST endpoints. Path alias @/* maps to project root.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes. components/ - React components including lead-capture/. lib/ - utility modules. tests/ - Playwright e2e tests. public/ - static assets.
